channel.title: Recipe Ideas from dinnerrecipes.github.io/idea
channel.description: A collection of delicious recipe ideas.

item.title: Simple Ideas Beef And Peas Chinese Recipe
item.description: This is the only Beef And Peas Chinese Recipe recipe you'll ever need. Seriously, it's that good! Head to our site for all the details. #bestrecipe #musttry #foodgoals #eatingfortheinsta #cheflife

item.title: Viral Spicy Beef Hot Pot Recipe
item.description: The ultimate guide to making the perfect Spicy Beef Hot Pot Recipe from scratch. It's easier than you think! Visit our website to become a pro. #fromscratch #bakinglove #cookingfromscratch #diyfood #kitchenskills

item.title: Mind-blowing Healthy Vegan Recipes With Bananas
item.description: A vegan Healthy Vegan Recipes With Bananas that even meat-lovers will enjoy. Packed with flavor and good-for-you ingredients. Get the plant-based recipe here! #veganrecipes #plantbased #veganfood #healthyvegan #whatveganseat

item.title: Surprising Easy Chicken Crockpot Recipes 4 Ingredients
item.description: Don't know what to cook today? Try this special Easy Chicken Crockpot Recipes 4 Ingredients recipe and impress everyone. Click the link for cooking instructions.

item.title: Simple Texas Beef Chili Recipe Slow Cooker
item.description: This 5-ingredient Texas Beef Chili Recipe Slow Cooker recipe is a lifesaver on busy days. Quick, simple, and oh-so-good. Save this pin for later! #5ingredients #quickandeasy #busymom #mealplan #simplerecipes
